description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade Java to latest LTS version (Java 21)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21 (latest LTS), update build configuration (pom.xml or build.gradle), migrate deprecated APIs, and ensure compatibility with Java 21 features and modules
tasks.summary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21, Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.3.5, updated javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces in Photo.java, updated ojdbc8 to ojdbc11, updated Dockerfile to eclipse-temurin:21. Build passed and unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to latest stable version (3.4.x)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4.x, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if needed, update Spring dependencies, and resolve breaking changes from Spring Boot 2.x/3.x migration
tasks.summary: Upgraded Spring Boot from 3.3.5 to 3.4.7 (latest 3.4.x stable). Spring Framework 6.2.x automatically included via BOM. jakarta.* namespace was already migrated. Build passed and unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Update project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.x, resolve dependency conflicts, and ensure no known security vulnerabilities
tasks.summary: Updated third-party dependencies: commons-io 2.11.0→2.21.0, ojdbc11 pinned to 23.26.1.0.0, H2 pinned to 2.4.240. Spring Boot starters kept at 3.4.7. Security check passed. Build succeeded and unit tests passed.
